report.summary: Day 57 standup v16: Full 6/6 rotation since v15. KEY DELTA — DATA QUALITY ISSUE: PUBLISHED_PAGES has 14 duplicate slugs; effective unique count is 392 (not 408 as previously reported). Build-v11 added Solana ETF + Crypto Payroll guides (450 lines combined). Publish-v9 promoted GPU Compute + DeFi Insurance. Design-2 fixed a11y on 3 pages. Community-v13 drafted FOMC eve campaign (5 tweets + 2 SVG cards + Discord update). EOD-v12 QA clean. Git locks now ~28h stale, 604 uncommitted files. FOMC decision TOMORROW 2pm ET. 1,080 page.tsx files. 75 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v15 Standup
items: ⚠️ DATA QUALITY: PUBLISHED_PAGES contains 14 duplicate slug entries (tools/staking-rewards, tools/onchain-analytics, tools/airdrop-tracker, tools/funding-rates, tools/portfolio-analytics, tools/social-metrics, tools/correlation-matrix, tools/market-heatmap, tools/dominance-tracker, tools/token-unlocks, tools/defi-yields, tools/crypto-calendar, ecosystem/hyperliquid, learn/defi-insurance-guide-2026). JS Set deduplicates at runtime → effective published count is 392 unique slugs, NOT 408 as reported in v15 and prior. Every prior report overcounted by ~14-16 slugs.
PUBLISHED_PAGES: 392 unique slugs (corrected from 408). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (/learn/solana-etf-guide-2026 + /learn/crypto-payroll-guide-2026).

New content this cycle (build-v11): 2 learn guides — Solana ETF Guide 2026 (230 lines, VanEck/21Shares/Grayscale/Canary/Bitwise issuer comparison, approval timeline, staking yield advantage) + Crypto Payroll Guide 2026 (220 lines, Bitwage/Request Finance/Deel/Franklin/Rise platform comparison, tax implications, stablecoin payroll). Both with Article+FAQ JSON-LD, full SEO metadata, 5 internal links each.
Publish-v9: Promoted GPU Compute Networks + DeFi Insurance from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue was briefly empty before build-v11 refilled it with 2 new items.

Design-2: UX audit on 8 pages — fixed font sizes on 3 (yield-bearing-stablecoins, chain-abstraction, gpu-compute), added BackToTop to chain-abstraction, increased tab touch targets to 44px+ on 2 pages. 5 pages passed without changes.

Community-v13: FOMC eve campaign — 5 tweets (dot plot scenario thread, GPU Compute launch, DeFi Insurance launch, stablecoin yield + rate hold, FOMC countdown), Discord evening update, newsletter template for Thu with 3 new guide spotlights. 2 SVG social cards created (FOMC dot plot scenarios + GPU Compute Networks).
EOD-v12: 42 TS errors (2 files, non-critical), 103 orphan slugs, all 6 API routes healthy, rate limiter still 0/6 core routes. Full build OOM in VM (non-blocking — Vercel has more RAM).
Total page.tsx files: 1,080 (up from 1,076 at v15). Market context: BTC $73,700, FOMC Day 1 complete, decision TOMORROW 2pm ET. 98% hold probability. GSC Day 18+ — organic clicks imminent.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v15
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6) since v15 — build-v11 + publish-v9 + design-2 + community-v13 + eod-v12 + standup-v16. Today total: 74 reports prior + v16 standup = 75 reports.

SHIPPED this cycle: Solana ETF Guide (230 lines) + Crypto Payroll Guide (220 lines); GPU Compute + DeFi Insurance promoted to published; 3 pages a11y-fixed (font sizes, BackToTop, touch targets); FOMC eve social campaign (5 tweets + 2 SVG cards + Discord + newsletter); EOD QA cycle.

⚠️ NEW FINDING [P1]: 14 duplicate slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES — runtime is correct (Set deduplicates) but entry count is inflated. Should clean up to avoid confusion in future reports. Affected: 11 tools, 1 ecosystem, 1 learn page appearing twice.
BLOCKER [P0] git HEAD.lock (~28h) + index.lock (~26h) — 604 uncommitted files. Deploy is cb65a9d (Day 42, 10+ days stale). FOMC decision TOMORROW. This is the 16th consecutive standup flagging this.
BLOCKER [P0] Rate Limiter 0/6 core routes — 25th+ consecutive standup. FOMC decision spike risk tomorrow on /api/prices and /api/trending.
CARRY-OVER [P1] PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Solana ETF + Crypto Payroll) awaiting next promote cycle.
CARRY-OVER [P1] 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx — will 404 in production.
CARRY-OVER [P1] 2 client-component pages (yield-bearing-stablecoins, chain-abstraction) lack server-side OG metadata — needs server wrapper refactor.
CARRY-OVER [P2] 42 TS errors in 2 files (non-blocking). Vercel Pro trial ~7 days remaining.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION REQUIRED: Remove git locks NOW. Commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit -m 'Day 57: 392 published pages, Solana-ETF+Crypto-Payroll+GPU-Compute+DeFi-Insurance guides, a11y+OG fixes' && git push. 28 hours of accumulated work across 604 modified files is invisible to production. FOMC decision is TOMORROW 2pm ET — the biggest single-day traffic catalyst in 6 weeks. Every hour of delay reduces content ROI.

PRIORITY 2 — Clean duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (14 entries) + wire rate limiters to all 6 API routes before FOMC spike. Historical pattern: BTC dropped after 7/8 FOMC meetings in 2025 — volatility drives API call spikes. Rate limiter coverage has been at 0/6 for 25+ standups.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote Solana ETF + Crypto Payroll from PUBLISH_QUEUE (→ 394 unique slugs) + continue build pipeline. Start addressing 103 orphan published slugs that will 404 in production — either scaffold pages or remove from PUBLISHED_PAGES. Verify Vercel billing before Mar 25 trial expiry.

STRATEGIC NOTE — Corrected baseline: the platform has 392 unique published slugs (not 408). Still strong — 1,080 total page.tsx files, 688 built-but-unpublished. Content velocity remains excellent (5 new guides in last 2 rotations). The immediate constraint is purely deployment: a 2-minute terminal action unlocks 28+ hours of work for the highest-traffic window of the month.

metrics.label: Agents That Ran This Cycle
metrics.value: 6 of 6 (build-v11 + publish-v9 + design-2 + community-v13 + eod-v12 + standup-v16)
